title: Senior Financial Analyst - Niva Bupa South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Niva Bupa South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Niva Bupa South Asia Partners:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners!
